7.reason: [The loop does not terminate input with a null terminator, leading to undefined behavior when accessing a[j+1] later. Also, EOF handling with %c may include newline characters and doesn't properly form a C string.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The loop does not terminate input with a null terminator, leading to undefined behavior when accessing a[j+1] later. Also, EOF handling with %c may include newline characters and doesn't properly form a C string.]

8.reason: [Loop goes up to j<=i, but valid indices are 0 to i-1; accessing a[i] (and a[j+1] when j=i-1) reads uninitialized memory.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop goes up to j<=i, but valid indices are 0 to i-1; accessing a[i] (and a[j+1] when j=i-1) reads uninitialized memory.]

13.reason: [Condition checks only one side of the range: e.g., a[j-1]>='0' but a[j+1]<='9' 鈥 should also check a[j+1]>='0' and similarly for letters. This allows invalid cross-type cases like '9-a' to pass.]
